project.name: Church Website & Event Management System
project.description: Modern website with event management, sermon archive, and member directory for a growing church community

features.name: Modern Responsive Website
features.description: Clean, accessible website design that works on all devices with easy navigation for all age groups

features.name: Event Management System
features.description: Calendar and event registration system for church events, Bible studies, and community gatherings

features.name: Sermon Archive
features.description: Searchable archive of past sermons with audio/video playback and notes

features.name: Staff & Leadership Directory
features.description: Directory of pastors, staff, and church leadership with contact information

features.name: Online Giving Integration
features.description: Secure online giving portal integrated with existing church management system

responsibilities: Design and development of all website pages
Responsive design accessible on all devices
Integration with existing church management tools
Training for church staff on content updates
assumptions: Church will provide all content, images, and sermon media
Church will provide feedback within 5 business days
Existing hosting will be used or new hosting will be arranged separately

recurring.description: Managed WordPress hosting with updates and backups
